text: We have $340M in unallocated capital following our IPO. Three proposals are on the table: (A) Acquire a competitor with $45M ARR at a 12x revenue multiple for $540M, requiring $200M debt financing. They have strong enterprise relationships but overlapping product. (B) Invest $120M in R&D to build our own AI-native platform over 24 months, with projected 3x efficiency gains. (C) Return $200M to shareholders via buyback and invest $140M across both product and GTM. Our stock is trading at 8x revenue, down from 14x at IPO. Current burn rate is $18M/quarter. The board wants a recommendation by month-end.
